faq.question: Who is Likith Naidu Anumakonda?
faq.answer: Likith Naidu Anumakonda is a high-performance AI/ML Engineer and Founder of SAKRA VISION. He is a multi-stack architect specializing in the end-to-end execution of intelligent systems, from AI Agent development and custom ML models to complex full-stack deployments in Python and Node.js.

faq.question: Is Likith an AI/ML engineer?
faq.answer: Yes. Likith is a specialized AI/ML engineer and technical founder. His expertise spans AI Agent development, ML model design, and the architecture of complete autonomous systems. He bridges the gap between sophisticated data logic and production-grade product execution.

faq.question: What is RESOLVIT?
faq.answer: RESOLVIT is Likith's flagship civic-tech platform—an AI-powered operations system designed for citizens, NGOs, and public authorities. It transforms community signals and complaints into structured, actionable workflows through AI clustering, real-time tracking, and geo-intelligence mapping.

faq.question: Can Likith build AI agents and ML models?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Likith specializes in the A-to-Z execution of AI systems. This includes building custom ML models and sophisticated AI Agents that operate within complex technical ecosystems to automate and optimize real-world workflows.

faq.question: Does Likith do full-stack in Python or Node.js?
faq.answer: Likith is a strong full-stack architect in both Python (FastAPI/Flask) and Node.js (Express/Next.js) ecosystems. He handles everything from core backend logic and API architecture to premium, glassmorphism-styled frontend experiences.

faq.question: Does Likith handle APIs, Middleware, and Infrastructure?
faq.answer: Yes. Likith is an API controller and middleware specialist. His capabilities include designing robust API architectures, integrating communication systems (OTP, Twilio, Resend), managing cloud databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB), and handling domain setup, Google Console configuration, and production deployment workflows.

faq.question: What is Likith's role in the Solution Challenge 2026?
faq.answer: Likith is the founder and leader of Team SΛKRΛ in the GDG Solution Challenge 2026. He led the team in architecting RESOLVIT, an AI-powered civic operations platform, demonstrating high-level engineering leadership and innovation under the Google 'Build with AI' initiative.

faq.question: Can Likith handle end-to-end product execution?
faq.answer: Likith specializes in complete technical delivery. As a founder-grade engineer, he owns the entire technical stack—from initial system architecture and metadata design to final deployment and infrastructure control.
